LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT DALE SCOTT & CO., INC'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-COMPLAINANTS' CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. - AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - CROSS-DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. WHILE IT APPEARS THAT SOME ISSUES RAISED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT MAY OVERLAP ISSUES TO BE ADDRESSED IN THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT AND ANSWER, OTHERS DO NOT. CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT DALE SCOTT & CO., INC.'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-COMPLAINANTS' CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF.

APPEARANCES: Joshua H. Lerner, Esq. & Genevieve P. Rosloff, Esq. of Durie Tangri LLP 362-6666 for pltf & moving party; Matthew Miller, Esq. of Carroll, Burdick & McDonough LLP 989-5900 for defts & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - CROSS-DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. WHILE IT APPEARS THAT SOME ISSUES RAISED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT MAY OVERLAP ISSUES TO BE ADDRESSED IN THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT AND ANSWER, OTHERS DO NOT. Cross-complainant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
